title: Claude Managed Agents 新增定时部署与环境变量
full_text:
ClaudeDevs on X: "We've just added two new Claude Managed Agents features:
1. Scheduled deployments - run tasks on a schedule
2. Environment variables - expose vault credentials for CLIs as environment variables https://t.co/exfhz4yylr" / X
